---
title: The gas-phase chemistry of urban atmospheres
date: '2001-01-01'
author:
- N. Carslaw
- D. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Surveys in Geophysics*'
---

## The gas-phase chemistry of urban atmospheres

<p class="pub-meta">N. Carslaw, D. Carslaw</p>

_*Surveys in Geophysics*_, 2001


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2001-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
